title: Convalytics MCP connection
description: Analytics queries plus saved conversion funnels for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and other MCP-capable clients. Default read-scoped tokens cover nine analytics tools and three funnel read tools; write-scoped tokens additionally let agents create/update/delete funnels. Requires a Convalytics API token and a Solo or Pro plan.

apiKey.title: Convalytics API token
apiKey.description: Create one at https://convalytics.dev/tokens. The MCP endpoint requires the Solo ($29/mo) or Pro ($99/mo) plan.

environment.title: Environment filter
environment.description: Optional. Scope every query to one environment so mixed dev + prod traffic doesn't pollute results. Leave blank to include everything. Matches what the Environment toggle does on the convalytics.dev dashboard.
